<?php namespace Aws\SSMGuiConnect; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **AWS SSM-GUIConnect** service. * @method \Aws\Result deleteConnectionRecordingPreferences(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise deleteConnectionRecordingPreferencesAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result getConnectionRecordingPreferences(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise getConnectionRecordingPreferencesAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result updateConnectionRecordingPreferences(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise updateConnectionRecordingPreferencesAsync(array $args = []) */ class SSMGuiConnectClient extends AwsClient {}
